notes:
## ✨ v2.2.0 — Voice Portrait, Per-Bar Images, Per-Button Frames

### New Features
* **Voice Portrait**: HUD portrait automatically switches to a designated variant while speaking. Pick the 🎤 icon next to any portrait variant in the Portrait tab. Reverts when you stop talking. Works on all clients.
* **Per-Button Frame Layers**: Each action menu button can have its own frame layers, independent of the global Button Frame. Expand "Per-Button Frame" on any category in the Menu tab.
* **Per-Bar Image Override**: Each bar-style tracking attribute can have its own Frame, Fill, and Background images. Expand "Bar Images" on any bar in the Tracking tab. Empty fields fall back to global defaults.

### Improvements
* Custom Theme submenu height reduced (450px → 380px).

announcement.title: ✨ v2.2.0: Voice Portrait, Per-Bar Images, Per-Button Frames
announcement.content: New: Voice Portrait — your HUD portrait switches automatically while speaking. Per-Button Frame Layers for individual action menu buttons. Per-Bar Image Override for bar-style tracking attributes. Plus reduced submenu height for custom themes.
